OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendry Crawford.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tooa Dunson is present.
Attorney Richard Smoke representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501 for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of DEC-12-2011 is vacated.
